creator: m230761@ingenieria.ingsala.unal.edu.co
text:
Port doesn´t fetch from the master site due to updated link.
The version of the program and libwww are old, the port should
at least use libwww4.0 instead of libwww2.0.

Fix: 

Please add an "/old" to httpd's url, it may also be interesting to
update libwww. Port maintainer doesn´t answer; I will try to update
it when I have time (perhaps next year).
How-To-Repeat: make fetch
